analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Swiss designer, out of love for Chinese tea culture, designs innovative tea-related products blending Chinese culture with international elements. This is a cultural appreciation/promotion item. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – not present; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China as benevolent power) – not present; no references to international law, peace, or multilateralism. CH3 (epic history/adversities) – not present; no historical struggle themes. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – not present; no politics or governance. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – not present; no mention of government-led achievements. CH6 (China is interesting culturally/naturally) – yes; it highlights Chinese tea culture’s appeal and international influence. Conclusion: Only CH6 applies.
